subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou in Whose grasp lieth the healing of all worlds, and through Whose Will the life of all worlds endureth, and by Whose Purpose all things are ordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من فی قبضتک شفاء العالمین و بارادتک حیوه العالمین و بمشیتک تقدیر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer
